issues.description: Duration is 'EndOfTurn' but card text states 'until the end of your opponent's next turn'. This requires duration:'DuringOpponentTurn' to represent the opponent's turn scope, not just your turn end.

Action type is 'PowerBoost' but card grants '+1 cost', not power. Should use 'GiveCost' or equivalent cost modifier action if available in DSL, or clarify if this is intentionally modeling cost as power for the system.
